Label: /F10/
Issue: does not specify the format of the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall support PCAP files in the .pcap and .pcapng formats.

Label: /F20/
Issue: does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The default values for the preprocessor configuration shall be: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F22/
Issue: does not specify the expected time for the preprocessor to run
Correction: The preprocessor shall complete its run within 5 minutes for a PCAP file of up to 1GB.

Label: /F30/
Issue: does not specify the maximum number of nodes and edges that can be displayed
Correction: The system shall support displaying up to 1000 nodes and 5000 edges in the network topology graph.

Label: /F40/
Issue: does not specify the color-coding scheme for protocols
Correction: The system shall use the following color-coding scheme for protocols: HTTP - Blue, FTP - Green, SSH - Red, etc.

Label: /F50/
Issue: does not specify the update frequency of the performance analysis graphs
Correction: The performance analysis graphs shall update every 5 seconds during the preprocessor run.

Label: /F60/
Issue: does not specify the zoom levels for the graphs
Correction: The system shall support zoom levels from 10% to 500% for all graphs.

Label: /F70/
Issue: does not specify the image format for saving graphs
Correction: The system shall support saving graphs in PNG and JPEG formats.

Label: /F80/
Issue: does not specify the maximum number of runs that can be compared
Correction: The system shall support comparing up to 5 preprocessor runs simultaneously.

Label: /F90/
Issue: does not specify the responsiveness criteria
Correction: The system shall remain responsive to user input with a maximum delay of 1 second while the preprocessor is running.

Label: /F100/
Issue: does not specify the types of statistics to be shown
Correction: The system shall show the following statistics: Total packets, Packets per protocol, Average packet size, etc.

Label: /F200/
Issue: does not specify the window size for separate graph windows
Correction: The separate graph windows shall have a default size of 800x600 pixels.

Label: /F210/
Issue: does not specify the default key bindings
Correction: The default key bindings shall be: Ctrl + O for opening a saved session, Ctrl + S for saving a session, Ctrl + Alt + S for saving a session by selecting a file, Ctrl + R for running the preprocessor.

Label: /F220/
Issue: does not specify the format of the identifiers
Correction: The identifiers shall be in the format of a 32-character hexadecimal string.

Label: /F230/
Issue: does not specify the exact warning message
Correction: The warning message shall be: "Warning: The selected PCAP file contains more than 2 million packets. The program may become less responsive."

Label: /F240/
Issue: does not specify the structure of the PDF report
Correction: The PDF report shall include sections for configurations, results, and performance graphs, each with appropriate headings and subheadings.

Label: /P10/
Issue: does not specify the maximum delay for showing results
Correction: The system shall show results of the older preprocessing configuration in under 1 second.

Label: /S10/
Issue: does not specify the security measures to prevent data leaks
Correction: The system shall ensure that no information about the PCAP is accessible by inspecting the source of the website through encryption and secure data handling practices.

Label: /E10/
Issue: does not specify the design principles for expandability
Correction: The system shall be designed using modular principles to allow easy addition or removal of menus, menu items, preprocessor configuration options, and statistics without restructuring the program.
